name: Arbitrage Bond Temporary Period Investment

eligibility.description: Issuers of state or local bonds who use proceeds for the project within specified timeframes (generally 6 months to 2 years depending on the project type).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows issuers of tax-exempt bonds to invest proceeds in higher-yielding investments for a temporary period without losing tax-exempt status.
